supadata.description: Supadata hosted transcript retrieval and AI transcript generation from public source URLs

auto.description: Auto mode — fetch a native transcript when available, otherwise fall back to AI generation
auto.pricingNotes: Supadata pricing is credit-based rather than duration-based: 1 transcript request is 1 credit and generated transcript minutes cost 2 credits/min. The default reference rate is Basic/Pro auto-recharge at $10 per 1,000 credits. Free plan credits, yearly discounts, larger-plan auto-recharge rates, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: Supadata accepts public YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, X/Twitter, Facebook, and direct media/file URLs. Pricing is credit-based rather than USD-based: auto mode is approximately 1 credit when a native transcript exists, otherwise approximately 2 credits per minute when AI generation is required. Direct media/file URLs are always treated as generated transcripts by Supadata.
